Game: The King of Fighters- Dream Match 1999 1999-09-30T00:00:00-07:00 A special Dreamcast conversion of KOF '98 (NOT '99) with several additions for Sega's console. The game remains the same as the original arcade version, but now includes new backgrounds (some with some polygonal enhancements) and a series of complementary bonus materials like conceptual galleries, sound test modes, etc. 2 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/20d29881-28c1-4682-b6ec-62e25925583d.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/c7c8f998-f634-49e8-a318-d48884103b5c.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/614202c1-bb5c-40c3-95ab-0937097dc340.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/5a53ed00-2268-445c-b6f4-8228a1d0e412.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/bb8fcd6e-d866-47d1-af71-bc371f6f90d6.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/8797ed20-1dcb-4605-a01e-bb6495506297.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/cd55e16c-e17e-4ea2-82fa-33b1e702b1a8.png 5 T - Teen Fighting SNK SNK
